content:
Create a thrilling “choose your own adventure” game for me to play through. I’ll be picking from choices you give me. Some of them are in my favour and some of them are not. The outcome is only revealed after I make my choice.

I’m Tommy Rollins, the main character of this fighting game (similar to Streets of Rage, Final Fight etc). 

Tommy Rollins: 100 hitpoints, Balanced Fighter

I face the following enemies in their level:

Level: Elite School

Enemies: 
Cocky Jock: 35 Hitpoints, Tough
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints, Acrobatic
Flirty Gymnast: 25 Hitpoints, Flexible

The enemies will attack me at the same time, using various attacks to try and knock me unconscious. My goal is to knock each of them out and make it to the next level.

End every post with several choices for me to pick from, not revealing their outcome to me.

moves.text_span: cious. My goal is to knock each of them out and make it to the next level.

content:
You enter the Elite School level, ready to face off against the first set of enemies. The Cocky Jock smirks at you and cracks his knuckles, while the Naughty Cheerleader giggles and twirls her pom-poms. The Flirty Gymnast warms up with a series of flips and splits. You prepare for battle, knowing that these three won't go down without a fight.

Do you:

A) Charge at the Cocky Jock and try to take him out first?

B) Jump over the Naughty Cheerleader's pom-poms and go for the Flirty Gymnast?

C) Use your balanced fighting style to take on all three at once?

Choose wisely.

moves.text_span: You enter the Elite School level, ready to face off against the first set of ene...

content:
You charge at the Cocky Jock, hoping to catch him off guard. He braces himself for impact and throws a punch, which you dodge easily. You manage to land a few solid hits on him, but he's tougher than you expected. Meanwhile, the Naughty Cheerleader throws her pom-poms at you, trying to trip you up, while the Flirty Gymnast flips around you, trying to confuse you.

Do you:

A) Keep focusing on the Cocky Jock and try to take him down quickly?

B) Fight defensively and wait for an opening?

C) Try to dodge the pom-poms and counter-attack the Naughty Cheerleader?

Choose quickly, or you might get overwhelmed.

moves.text_span: A) Keep focusing on the Cocky Jock and try to take him down

content:
You keep focusing on the Cocky Jock, determined to take him down quickly. Your punches connect, but he's still standing, and he retaliates with a powerful uppercut that sends you flying. You land hard on the ground, losing some of your hitpoints.

Do you:

A) Get back up and keep fighting?

B) Take a moment to catch your breath and assess the situation?

C) Retreat and find a different strategy? 

Choose quickly, or you'll be in trouble.

moves.text_span: You keep focusing on the Cocky Jock, determined to take him

content:
You take a moment to catch your breath and assess the situation. The Cocky Jock is still standing, the Naughty Cheerleader is ready to attack, and the Flirty Gymnast is flipping around you, taunting you. You realize that you won't be able to take them all down at once, and you need to come up with a new strategy.

Do you:

A) Try to take out the Naughty Cheerleader first, since she has the least amount of hitpoints?

B) Use your surroundings to your advantage, like throwing a nearby desk at one of your enemies?

C) Call for backup, hoping that someone will come to your aid?

Choose quickly, or you might get overwhelmed.

moves.text_span: You take a moment to catch your breath and assess the situation. The Cocky Jock...

content:
You decide to focus on the Naughty Cheerleader, hoping to take her down quickly. She jumps and flips around you, trying to evade your attacks, but you manage to land a few punches and kicks. She lands on the ground, out of hitpoints.

Do you:

A) Keep focusing on the Cocky Jock?

B) Attack the Flirty Gymnast while she's distracted?

C) Take a moment to heal some of your hitpoints?

Choose quickly, the other enemies won't wait around for you.

moves.text_span:
A) Keep focusing on the Cocky Jock?

B) Attack the Flirty G

content:
With one enemy down, you turn your attention back to the Cocky Jock. He's still standing strong, but you're determined to take him down. You launch a series of punches and kicks, but he's tough and manages to block most of them. He counters with a powerful punch that knocks you back, draining your hitpoints.

Do you:

A) Keep fighting, even though you're hurt?

B) Retreat and try to heal up before continuing the fight?

C) Use a special move to catch the Cocky Jock off guard?

Choose quickly or you might not last much longer.

moves.text_span: With one enemy down, you turn your attention back to the Cocky Jock. He's still...

content:
You decide to use one of your special moves to catch the Cocky Jock off guard. You sweep his legs, causing him to stumble, and then launch a powerful uppercut that sends him flying. He lands on the ground, out of hitpoints.

Do you:

A) Take a moment to heal up before facing the other enemies?

B) Go after the Flirty Gymnast, since she's the last enemy standing?

C) Linger and taunt the Cocky Jock before moving on?

Choose quickly, there's still a ways to go before you can clear the level.

moves.text_span: You decide to use one of your special moves to catch the Cocky Jock off guard. Y...

content:
With only the Flirty Gymnast left, you decide to take her down before moving on. She's fast and flexible, but you manage to dodge her flips and kicks and land a few punches and kicks of your own. She lands on the ground, out of hitpoints.

Do you:

A) Celebrate your victory over the enemies and move on to the next level?

B) Take a moment to heal up before moving on, knowing that the next set of enemies will be even tougher?

C) Search the room for any items or weapons that might help you in the next level?

Choose wisely, the next level holds more challenges.

moves.text_span: With only the Flirty Gymnast left, you decide to take her down before moving on....
